---
title: "homework_02"
output: html_document
date: "2024-01-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

### Anushka's Fun Fact:

### She has seven nicknames: Nush, Nushie, Nushk, Nushkanator, Skanush, Skadoosh, and Anna

### Anushka's Website:

### https://github.com/ACanfield7/CanfieldBiol6100/blob/main/homework_02.Rmd
